message:
chore(beads): close frankenpandas-fd90.18

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -447,7 +447,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.15","title":"prelude: promote SparseDType, AggFunc, GroupByOptions, index_to_frame/series","description":"Sixth paired-surface defect (fd90.10-14). Five more user-facing items at crate root but missing from prelude.

- SparseDType  — used with Scalar::Sparse and SparseAccessor (which IS in prelude)
- AggFunc      — paired with DataFrameGroupBy.agg_named (which IS in prelude). README documents groupby aggregation extensively.
- GroupByOptions / GroupByExecutionOptions — option structs for groupby.with_options
- index_to_frame / index_to_series — Index conversion helpers from fd90.270

Plan: promote all 5 to the prelude with compile guard.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:51:54.481733412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:53:49.959550998Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:53:49.957397359Z","close_reason":"completed: 6 helpers promoted to prelude","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.15","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:51:54.481733412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.16","title":"prelude: promote DateRangeError/TimedeltaRangeError/cast_scalar_owned/read_csv_with_index_cols*","description":"Final round of paired-surface defects (fd90.10-15). Five items at crate root paired with already-promoted counterparts:

- DateRangeError          — paired error type for date_range / bdate_range (in prelude)
- TimedeltaRangeError     — paired error type for timedelta_range (in prelude)
- cast_scalar_owned       — paired with cast_scalar (in prelude)
- read_csv_with_index_cols
- read_csv_with_index_cols_path
                          — pair with read_csv_with_options (in prelude)

After this, remaining top-level-only items are legitimately advanced/internal: 17 SQL index_col variants, 10 alignment-planning internals, 10 expression-engine internals (below DataFrameExprExt), 9 advanced runtime types, 6 lower-level datetime/timedelta utilities. Those stay top-level only since they're below the user-facing prelude tier.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:55:00.764047232Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T11:56:47.618312372Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T11:56:47.616288399Z","close_reason":"completed: 5 paired helpers promoted to prelude","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.16","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T11:55:00.764047232Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.17","title":"test(readme): functional coverage for Period/Timedelta/Timestamp/Interval + range fns","description":"Self-review of fd90.14 (commit b36bbf7) caught a gap: the bead promoted 11 fp-types pandas-equivalent helpers (Period, PeriodFreq, Timedelta, TimedeltaComponents, TimedeltaError, Timestamp, Interval, IntervalClosed, period_range, interval_range_by_periods, interval_range_by_step) to the prelude with a compile-only guard. Nothing currently exercises them functionally end-to-end — runtime breakage in any of them would not be caught.

Plan:
- Add readme_pandas_helpers_round_trip integration test reachable via prelude alone
- Construct Period/PeriodFreq, exercise period_range and assert length
- Construct Timestamp via from_nanos / parse, exercise basic operations
- Construct Timedelta from parse, inspect via TimedeltaComponents
- Construct Interval with IntervalClosed variants, exercise interval_range_by_periods + interval_range_by_step
- Demonstrates the README's documented pandas-parity surface actually executes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:10:15.944316412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:12:31.270246734Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T12:12:31.268191031Z","close_reason":"completed: functional integration test for fd90.14 helpers","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.17","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:10:15.944316412Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.18","title":"test(readme): functional coverage for fd90.15 helpers (index_to_frame/series, AggFunc, GroupByOptions)","description":"Self-review of fd90.15 (commit 37b4eb5) caught a gap parallel to fd90.17: the bead promoted 6 helpers to the prelude with a compile-only guard (fd90_015_misc_helpers_via_prelude). Nothing exercises them functionally end-to-end.

Plan: add readme_index_helpers_round_trip integration test reachable via prelude alone:
- index_to_frame(index, Some(name)) → DataFrame with the correct column
- index_to_frame(index, None) → DataFrame with default-named column
- index_to_series(index, Some(name)) → Series with correct labels
- AggFunc enum variant access via match (Sum, Mean, etc.)
- GroupByOptions / GroupByExecutionOptions Default + field access","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:13:25.145057476Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:13:59.427923447Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.18","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:13:25.145057476Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Nothing exercises them functionally end-to-end.

- index_to_frame(index, Some(name)) → DataFrame with the correct column
- index_to_frame(index, None) → DataFrame with default-named column
- index_to_series(index, Some(name)) → Series with correct labels
- AggFunc enum variant access via match (Sum, Mean, etc.)
- GroupByOptions / GroupByExecutionOptions Default + field access","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:13:25.145057476Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T12:15:35.265938228Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T12:15:35.263925756Z","close_reason":"completed: functional integration test for fd90.15 helpers","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.18","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T12:13:25.145057476Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","title":"fp-io read_sql_table chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse the table-name validation/escaping path, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for batching and invalid chunksize/table names.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.683429602Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:50:35.681545888Z","close_reason":"Completed in 693dc14","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.2","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:46:41.440828863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","title":"fp-io read_sql_table_columns chunksize helper","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns chunk helper for pandas-style read_sql_table(..., columns=[...], chunksize=...) on the existing SqlConnection surface. Reuse table/column validation and projection query construction, return SqlChunkIterator, expose the umbrella re-export, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, zero chunksize, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.073612091Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T07:58:32.071766828Z","close_reason":"Completed in 03a4ce7","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.3","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T07:51:48.478054749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","title":"fp-io SQL chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine pandas-style chunksize with index_col promotion. Cover read_sql/read_sql_query/read_sql_table chunk paths by wrapping SqlChunkIterator, preserving per-chunk RangeIndex when index_col is None and promoting/removing the named column when set. Add umbrella re-exports and focused fp-io tests for query chunks, table chunks, None behavior, and missing index_col errors.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.040272870Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:08:08.038384696Z","close_reason":"Completed in 90fd549","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.4","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:00:11.325655162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
